title: THE PULSE BELOW
artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC BOOK title splash, full-page cinematic panel with thick black outer border. Mira Eggwarden at present-day Riftwild Commons fringe touching a vertical cyan Fracture tear; warm amber dusk on timber roofs behind her. The tear dissolves upward into a ghost-vision of courier Elara Venn cradling a glowing egg on mud that will become the Commons. Clear empty upper third for title lettering. ONE continuous painted scene — no floating creature cards, no collage insets, no split artbook plates. Earth tones, cyan accent. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, logos, watermarks, UI, or credit labels.

lines.text: A present-day Keeper touches an ancient tear — and the First Rift answers.
